criteriaResults.evidence: agents/bober-deployer.md YAML: name:bober-deployer, tools:[Read,Bash,Grep,Glob], model:sonnet. NOT read-only (Bash present); every action gated.
Iron Law verbatim @52 'NO RISKY ACTION WITHOUT CHECKPOINT APPROVAL; NO ACTION WITHOUT RECORDED INVERSE'. 8 Red Flags, 8 Rationalization rows.
SAFE/RISKY classification tables @82-114 with 'WHEN IN DOUBT: classify risky' verbatim @114. classify.ts RISKY_PATTERNS default-deny matches docs.

skills/bober.deploy/SKILL.md 10-step Execution Loop @81-120, Abort Discipline 3-step (inverse→verify→escalate) @171-186, Hard Gate verbatim 'Autopilot mode does NOT bypass risky-action approval' @124-134.

spawn.ts mergeObsTools+loadAgentDefinition Sprint 16 pattern. execute.ts:112-119 mech.request() payload {kind,actionId,description,classification,classificationReasoning,command,inverse} — all 3 required fields.

resolve.ts:62-64 forced floor: isRisky && !allow && resolved==='noop' → 'disk'. schema.ts:172 default false. Test verifies autopilot+noop+risky→'disk'; escape hatch true→'noop' with stern stderr warning + ChangeEntry preserved.

execute.ts:146-155 writes 'pending' BEFORE executor.run, :174-187 writes terminal entry (executed|failed) in catch. Test scenario 5 verifies both pending+failed on executor throw. Missing-inverse aborts BEFORE any ChangeEntry/executor call.
All 4 strategies exit 0. 973 tests pass, 4 skipped.

summary: All 8 criteria pass on iter 1. Highest-risk Tier 3 sprint shipped clean: unconditional gate (autopilot+noop+risky→disk floor) enforced via pure resolveRiskyActionMechanismName; escape hatch preserves audit + stern warning; inverse-REQUIRED guard fires before any IO; classifyCommand uses default-deny on COMMAND content (authoritative over agent self-declaration, handles multi-command chains); ChangeEntry pending-then-terminal sequence durable on crash. 973 tests (+22), baseline 951 preserved.
